title: Iran and U.S. Officials Signal Progress as Cease-Fire Hangs in Balance
summary_full: As people across the Middle East braced for the possibility of renewed fighting, officials from both sides said there were signs that they were moving closer to an agreement.
summary_public: As people across the Middle East braced for the possibility of renewed fighting, officials from both sides said there were signs that they were moving closer to an agreement.
